title: Deli & Dough Uber Eats hero banner: grade + cut out four supplied deli shots, source a butcher-paper backdrop, vectorize the wordmark, and bind into an authored 2880x2304 banner template for print-ready export
one_line_ask: Grade four raw deli photos to one cohesive gritty-warm look, cut the hero sandwich onto transparency, source a butcher-paper backdrop, vectorize the Deli & Dough wordmark, and bind all the prepped parts into the client's authored 2880x2304 Illustrator banner template to export a print-ready Uber Eats hero banner.

issues: Slight luminance noise consistent with phone snapshot (acceptable per brief)
Cool color cast present (pipeline fix expected)
Minor tilt ~2-3 degrees clockwise (within acceptable <=5deg threshold)
Pepper shaker in background slightly clutters frame but adds candid authenticity
Brine sheen slightly uneven on leftmost spear but within photoreal tolerance
Slight texture/distress on letterforms is intentional per brief
Gold keyline is subtle but present and acceptable
Letter spacing is tight but legible and appropriate for condensed vintage style
Very slight forward/low angle perspective rather than pure overhead flat lighting, but within acceptable documentary style
Toothpick visible and correct but cellophane/frilled top is yellow rather than classic plain toothpick — minor
Wax paper present and appropriately crumpled
Background shows squeeze bottles and deli pass clutter — matches brief well
No visible steam rising from meat but brief says 'steaming' — minor omission
Tilt appears minimal, possibly under 5 degrees — acceptable per brief
Meat texture, rye seeds, grease sheen, mustard smear all clearly present and photoreal
No severe AI artifacts detected — no melted forms, ghosting, or duplicated elements
Composition is tall/portrait which suits cutout chain requirement
Very slight warm color cast (intentional per brief)
Counter surface scratches visible but appropriate for diner aesthetic
Background shelf slightly busier than ideal but within brief spec
Steam wisps subtle but present and convincing
Sugar packets stack is slightly splayed/informal but reads correctly
Slight perspective angle rather than perfectly flat front-on, but within acceptable range for a handheld snapshot brief
Right half slightly overexposed/blown out as intended
Napkin dispenser and menu board visible in background as specified
Warm tungsten color cast present as intended

assets.name: banner_template.ai
assets.note: Client-provided .ai template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
